info.title: Kaneo API
info.description: Kaneo Project Management API - Manage projects, tasks, labels, and more

schema.description: The ID of the invitation to get

userId.description: The user id of the organization creator. If not provided, the current user will be used. Should only be used by admins or when called by the server. server-only. Eg: "user-id"

keepCurrentActiveOrganization.description: Whether to keep the current active organization active after creating a new one. Eg: true

organizationSlug.description: The organization slug to set as active. It can be null to unset the active organization if organizationId is not provided. Eg: "org-slug"

email.description: The email address of the user to invite

role.description: The role(s) to assign to the user. It can be `admin`, `member`, owner. Eg: "member"

organizationId.description: The organization ID to invite the user to

resend.description: Resend the invitation email, if the user is already invited. Eg: true

invitationId.description: The ID of the invitation to cancel
The ID of the invitation to accept
The ID of the invitation to reject

slug.description: The organization slug to check. Eg: "my-org"

memberIdOrEmail.description: The ID or email of the member to remove

organizationId.description: The ID of the organization to remove the member from. If not provided, the active organization will be used. Eg: "org-id"

role.description: The new role to be applied. This can be a string or array of strings representing the roles. Eg: ["admin", "sale"]

memberId.description: The member id to apply the role update to. Eg: "member-id"

organizationId.description: An optional organization ID which the member is a part of to apply the role update. If not provided, you must provide session headers to get the active organization. Eg: "organization-id"
The organization Id for the member to leave. Eg: "organization-id"

name.description: The name of the team. Eg: "my-team"

organizationId.description: The organization ID which the team will be created in. Defaults to the active organization. Eg: "organization-id"

teamId.description: The team ID of the team to remove. Eg: "team-id"

organizationId.description: The organization ID which the team falls under. If not provided, it will default to the user's active organization. Eg: "organization-id"

teamId.description: The ID of the team to be updated. Eg: "team-id"
The team the user should be a member of.

userId.description: The user Id which represents the user to be added as a member.

teamId.description: The team the user should be removed from.

userId.description: The user which should be removed from the team.

tags.name: Default
tags.description: Default endpoints that are included with Better Auth by default. These endpoints are not part of any plugin.
